criterion: Human liver/HCC transcriptomic dataset with genome-wide expression profiling.
Recoverable sample-level phenotype labels for tumor vs adjacent/non-tumor, or hepatitis-stage clinical strata for axis construction.
At least 10 tumor and 10 non-tumor samples for tumor/non-tumor validation, unless used only for expression concordance or tumor-heavy sensitivity analysis.
Processed matrices or count matrices available from GEO/TCGA with gene-level mapping possible.
Cell-line-only, xenograft-only, or treatment-perturbation-only datasets without baseline liver tissue.
Datasets lacking usable sample-level phenotype labels after manual metadata inspection.
Datasets with too few samples for group-level inference.
Duplicated cohorts or subsets already represented by a larger selected dataset.
